title: watch: watch directory canonicalized on every file event instead of once
description: In watch_loop, tokio::fs::canonicalize(&watch_path) is called inside the while loop on every received file event (line 70-76). watch_path does not change after the watcher is started. The canonicalized form should be computed once before the loop and reused, saving a syscall per event.
close_reason: Fixed: watch dir canonicalized once before event loop.
